non_event_rows: 1 log-show summary row ({count, finished}) + 3-line footer naming the source archive
capture_tool: log collect (on-device archive pull over USB) + log show --style ndjson with channel predicate
source_archive: /Volumes/RoadtripCapture/iphone-trip.logarchive (per file footer; encrypted volume per checklist)
redaction: dan, 2026-06-12: mid-trip interval only (I-75 through Appalachia); departure and arrival excluded by design. Measured at ingestion: 0 coordinates, 0 BSSIDs, 0 SSIDs in the clear; 4 fields carry the OS's own <private> masking.
selection_method: dan's interval truncation of the full archive; channel predicate per capture checklist (locationd / CoreLocation / wifi / timesync / CommCenter). Excerpt thinning method not yet stated — open question, affects any cadence claim.
